news.title:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank plans an analyst/investor meet on March 6, 2026.
No UPSI or material info will be disclosed; venue is Kanakia Wall Street, Mumbai.
news.summary:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank plans an analyst/investor meet on March 6, 2026.
No UPSI or material info will be disclosed; venue is Kanakia Wall Street, Mumbai.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank to conduct a one-on-one investor meet on Feb 26, 2026.
No UPSI or material information will be shared during the meeting.
news.summary:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank to conduct a one-on-one investor meet on Feb 26, 2026.
No UPSI or material information will be shared during the meeting.

news.title:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd achieved an all-time high of Rs.660 on 09 Feb 2026.
The milestone reflects strong financial performance and sustained market momentum.
news.summary:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd achieved an all-time high of Rs.660 on 09 Feb 2026.
The milestone reflects strong financial performance and sustained market momentum.

news.title:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank raises MCLR rates effective 7 Feb 2026.
Overnight, 1-month, 3-month, and 6-month MCLR increased; 1-year remains at 9.25%.
news.summary:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank raises MCLR rates effective 7 Feb 2026.
Overnight, 1-month, 3-month, and 6-month MCLR increased; 1-year remains at 9.25%.

news.title: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank's Q3 revenue rose to 14.7B rupees from 13.3B YoY.
news.summary: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank's Q3 revenue rose to 14.7B rupees from 13.3B YoY.

news.title:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank's Q3 GNPA declined to 0.91% from 1.01% QoQ.
Q3 NNPA also reduced to 0.20% from 0.26% QoQ.
news.summary:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank's Q3 GNPA declined to 0.91% from 1.01% QoQ.
Q3 NNPA also reduced to 0.20% from 0.26% QoQ.

news.title:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank's valuation shifted from very attractive to attractive, reflecting market sentiment.
Despite a Mojo Grade downgrade to Hold, its P/E and P/BV ratios remain compelling versus peers.
news.summary:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank's valuation shifted from very attractive to attractive, reflecting market sentiment.
Despite a Mojo Grade downgrade to Hold, its P/E and P/BV ratios remain compelling versus peers.

news.title:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd hits all-time high at Rs. 609.1.
The milestone reflects its robust performance in private sector banking.
news.summary:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd hits all-time high at Rs. 609.1.
The milestone reflects its robust performance in private sector banking.

news.title:
Banks and NBFCs urge Union Budget 2026-27 to address deposit stress and MSME credit gaps amid strong credit demand.
Key asks include tax incentives, digital adoption, MSME refinance facilities, and a Rs 20,000 crore credit guarantee for MFIs.
news.summary:
Banks and NBFCs urge Union Budget 2026-27 to address deposit stress and MSME credit gaps amid strong credit demand.
Key asks include tax incentives, digital adoption, MSME refinance facilities, and a Rs 20,000 crore credit guarantee for MFIs.

news.title:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank to host an earnings call on Feb 4, 2026, at 5:30 PM IST.
Call will discuss unaudited Q3 FY26 financial results; details shared for investor access.
news.summary:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank to host an earnings call on Feb 4, 2026, at 5:30 PM IST.
Call will discuss unaudited Q3 FY26 financial results; details shared for investor access.

news.title:
Six banks reported double-digit loan growth in Q3 FY26 YoY.
Deposits also showed healthy growth during the October-December period.
news.summary:
Six banks reported double-digit loan growth in Q3 FY26 YoY.
Deposits also showed healthy growth during the October-December period.

news.title:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank reports 14.3% growth in Q3 FY25, total business at ₹1,07,470 Cr.
Total advances rose 16.3% to ₹50,763 Cr, deposits increased 12.5% to ₹56,707 Cr.
news.summary:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank reports 14.3% growth in Q3 FY25, total business at ₹1,07,470 Cr.
Total advances rose 16.3% to ₹50,763 Cr, deposits increased 12.5% to ₹56,707 Cr.

news.title:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank partners with Rugr FinTech to source RBI-licensed payment aggregators.
The partnership focuses on UPI merchant collections to enhance digital payment solutions.
news.summary:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank partners with Rugr FinTech to source RBI-licensed payment aggregators.
The partnership focuses on UPI merchant collections to enhance digital payment solutions.

news.title:
CASA ratios across PSU and private banks declined, averaging 36.4% in Q2 FY26, down 115 bps YoY, driven by rate cycles and deposit shifts.
Bank of Maharashtra led with 50.4% CASA, while IDFC FIRST Bank and Central Bank of India followed. Smaller banks like Bandhan and DCB struggled below 28%.
news.summary:
CASA ratios across PSU and private banks declined, averaging 36.4% in Q2 FY26, down 115 bps YoY, driven by rate cycles and deposit shifts.
Bank of Maharashtra led with 50.4% CASA, while IDFC FIRST Bank and Central Bank of India followed. Smaller banks like Bandhan and DCB struggled below 28%.

news.title:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank cancels investor meet with Aditya Birla Capital scheduled for Nov 18, 2025.
Cancellation follows prior intimation; disclosed under SEBI Regulation 30 LODR guidelines.
news.summary:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank cancels investor meet with Aditya Birla Capital scheduled for Nov 18, 2025.
Cancellation follows prior intimation; disclosed under SEBI Regulation 30 LODR guidelines.

news.title:
RBI's export credit moratorium extension to 450 days won't impact banks' profitability significantly, targeting Rs 2L cr loans.
Banks like Axis, TMB, and RBL see this as temporary liquidity relief for exporters; asset quality monitoring remains key.
news.summary:
RBI's export credit moratorium extension to 450 days won't impact banks' profitability significantly, targeting Rs 2L cr loans.
Banks like Axis, TMB, and RBL see this as temporary liquidity relief for exporters; asset quality monitoring remains key.

news.title:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank fined Rs. 39.6L by RBI for regulatory breaches.
Issues include UPI charges, DEA Fund delay; corrective actions initiated post-penalty.
news.summary:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank fined Rs. 39.6L by RBI for regulatory breaches.
Issues include UPI charges, DEA Fund delay; corrective actions initiated post-penalty.

news.title:
RBI approves S Krishnan as J&K Bank's part-time chairman from Nov 13, 2025.
Krishnan, ex-MD & CEO of Punjab Sind Bank, joined Tamilnad Mercantile Bank in Sep 2022.
news.summary:
RBI approves S Krishnan as J&K Bank's part-time chairman from Nov 13, 2025.
Krishnan, ex-MD & CEO of Punjab Sind Bank, joined Tamilnad Mercantile Bank in Sep 2022.

news.title:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank receives RBI approval for amendments to its Articles of Association.
Shareholder approval for the amendment will be sought via postal ballot.
news.summary:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank receives RBI approval for amendments to its Articles of Association.
Shareholder approval for the amendment will be sought via postal ballot.
